note: Full identity-collision matrix covered with concrete tests: test_read_project_rejects_duplicate_hierarchy_document_paths (project.yaml level), test_read_project_rejects_duplicate_document_ids (.meta level), test_read_project_rejects_hierarchy_id_path_mismatch (hierarchy vs disk cross-check), test_write_project_rejects_duplicate_document_paths_before_write (write-time guard before any file is touched).
